item.title: Sensex and Nifty Advance as Realty Leads Sector Gains; Mixed Performance Across Market Caps
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks closed higher on 4 May 2026, with the Sensex gaining 355.90 points (0.46%) to settle at 77,269.40 and the Nifty rising 121.75 points (0.51%) to 24,119.30. The rally was led by the Realty sector, which surged 2.51%, while the Teck sector lagged with a 1.53% decline. Market breadth remained positive with 351 advances against 146 declines on the BSE500, reflecting broad-based buying interest amid mixed global cues and cautious investor sentiment ahead of key corporate earnings. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Edges Higher with BHEL Leading Gains on 4 May 2026
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, demonstrated steady resilience on 4 May 2026, advancing by 0.62% amid mixed sectoral performances. BHEL emerged as the standout performer with a robust 6.97% return, while Sona BLW Precision lagged with a 5.10% decline. Market breadth remained healthy, with advancing stocks outnumbering decliners by more than two to one, signalling broad-based participation in the rally. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Surges with 1.07% Gain Led by Cemindia Project
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has demonstrated steady resilience, advancing by 1.07% on 4 May 2026. This marks a continuation of a positive trend, with the index also up 1.06% over the past five trading sessions, underscoring growing investor interest in this market segment despite mixed sectoral performances and varied breadth indicators. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Edges Higher Led by Adani Ports; Avenue Super Declines Amid Mixed Market Sentiment
item.description: The large-cap segment demonstrated a modest upward trajectory, with the BSE 100 index rising by 0.51% on 4 May 2026. While heavyweight stocks such as Adani Ports delivered robust returns, the segment also witnessed notable underperformance from select counters, reflecting a nuanced market environment shaped by defensive and cyclical sector dynamics. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd Surges 7.02% to Day's High of Rs 359.9 — Outperforms Sector by 5.53 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.46% on 4 May 2026, yet Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a robust 7.02% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 359.9. This 5.53 percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Globalspace Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 27.49
item.description: With a decisive intraday surge to Rs 27.49, Globalspace Technologies Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 47.06% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined 4.02% in the same period. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and robust price momentum despite a volatile trading session. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Medico Intercontinental Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 23.5 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Medico Intercontinental Ltd has extended its decline, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 23.5 on 4 May 2026. This latest drop comes amid a broader underperformance relative to its sector and the benchmark indices, signalling sustained selling pressure on the micro-cap stock. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts HCP Plastene Bulkpack Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 280.4
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 96 to a fresh high of Rs 280.4 on 4 May 2026, HCP Plastene Bulkpack Ltd has surged an impressive 162% over the past year, significantly outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 4.02%. This milestone reflects a powerful technical momentum that has propelled the stock well above all key moving averages, signalling robust buying interest despite a modest underperformance relative to its sector on the day. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Vertis Infrastructure Trust Hits All-Time High of Rs 110.5 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Vertis Infrastructure Trust has reached a significant milestone by hitting an all-time high price of Rs.110.5 on 4 May 2026, marking a notable achievement in its market journey amid a strong performance trend. Time: 59 minutes ago

item.title: Indegene Ltd Surges 7.28% to Day's High of Rs 533.8 — Outperforms Healthcare Sector by 7.59 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.52% on 4 May 2026, yet Indegene Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.28% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 533.8. This 7.59-percentage-point outperformance over its Healthcare Services sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Jio Financial Services Ltd Surges 3.0% to Day's High of Rs 253.1 — Outperforms Sector by 1.14 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.52% on 4 May 2026, yet Jio Financial Services Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 2.98% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 253.1. This 1.14 percentage-point outperformance over its NBFC sector peers highlights a stock-specific strength rather than a general market uplift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Syrma SGS Technology Ltd Surges 7.16% to Day's High of Rs 1028.7 — Outperforms Sector by 6.83 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.52% on 4 May 2026, yet Syrma SGS Technology Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.16% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1028.7. This 6.83-percentage-point outperformance over its Industrial Manufacturing sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Voltamp Transformers Ltd Surges 7.31% to Day's High of Rs 12572.25 — Outperforms Sector by 5.17 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.52% on 4 May 2026, yet Voltamp Transformers Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.31% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 12,572.25. This 5.17 percentage-point outperformance over its Heavy Electrical Equipment sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: PCBL Chemical Ltd Surges 7.01% to Day's High of Rs 312.75 — Outperforms Sector by 2.32 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.52% on 4 May 2026, yet PCBL Chemical Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.01% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 312.75. This 2.32 percentage-point outperformance over its sector peers in Other Chemical products signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Electrosteel Castings Ltd Surges 10.88% to Day's High of Rs 87.25 — Outperforms Sector by 7.22 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.52% on 4 May 2026, yet Electrosteel Castings Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 10.88% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 87.25. This 7.22 percentage-point outperformance over its Iron & Steel Products sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago
